brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: Now pull names and eras together. Separate columns with commas in the SELECT list.

hints.text: Carol: 'Watch the comma between columns. SELECT a, b — not SELECT a b.'
Carol: 'I wanted names AND eras. Check your two dropdowns.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: There we go. Every column you pull is a reminder that somebody, somewhere, had to type this in.
